assumptions: The declared intragroup dividend has created a foreign-currency monetary receivable or payable within the group.
The question is about hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements under IFRS 9.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies a fair value hedge for a recognised asset or liability and also addresses foreign currency risk on an intragroup monetary item in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies a cash flow hedge for variability in cash flows and expressly discusses foreign currency risk on highly probable forecast intragroup transactions in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context separately identifies net investment hedge accounting as a distinct foreign currency hedge model in consolidated financial statements.
